headline: The Non-Defense Winner Investors Missed in the Iran War Supply Shock
summary: While defense names grabbed the headlines in the immediate aftermath of the start of the Iran war, an unlikely winner emerged from the ensuing shock to the market, with gains of 75% year to date? Chemical stock Dow (NYSE:DOW) has seen its shares do exactly that. The broader market has wrestled with supply shocks and inflation ... The Non-Defense Winner Investors Missed in the Iran War Supply Shock
